title: Sweeper
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Sweeper''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that dropped off supplies to the same location where the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] ''[[Juvaini]]'' was attacked and destroyed.

==Behind the scenes==
It is unknown whether it was affiliated to the Empire as the ship was coded blue in the [[Combat Multi-view Display|CMD]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}

[[Category:BFF-1 bulk freighters]]
